description: Recto: Fragment of badly damaged document in Arabic, wide line-spacing. Medieval-era. A page from a text in vocalized Hebrew is fused to the document in Arabic, leaving much of the four lines illegible. There is also extensive text in Arabic on the verso, probably accounts, which also may have fused to the recto fragment due to centuries of pressure in a geniza chamber. Requires further examination.
description_he: פנים: קטע ממסמך ערבי פגום עם רווח שורות רחב; דף בעברית מנוקדת מחוברים למסמך; גב: טקסט ערבי נרחב, כנראה חשבונות, שהתמזג עם הפנים
